data_sources: SEC EDGAR filings - Form 10-Q filed 2026-05-11 for Q1 2026 (official XBRL values)
Official XBRL financial data extracted from 10-Q
Management's Discussion and Analysis (10-Q Part I, Item 2)

clinical_programs.combination: Requires manual extraction from 10-Q clinical description
clinical_programs.patient_population: Advanced NSCLC patients with prior therapy

clinical_programs.indication: not disclosed in available filings (likely NSCLC or other solid tumor)
clinical_programs.source: Program mentioned in filings but details not disclosed

milestone_calendar.why_it_matters: Enrollment completion de-risks trial execution and provides timeline visibility for data readout
milestone_calendar.risk_if_delayed: Extends time to data, may require additional financing

milestone_calendar.why_it_matters: Primary efficacy data on OS/PFS endpoints; potential regulatory filing trigger
milestone_calendar.risk_if_delayed: Cash runway pressure, market uncertainty, dilution risk

milestone_calendar.why_it_matters: Could support additional indications or combination approaches
milestone_calendar.risk_if_delayed: Less critical than pivotal Phase 3, but provides optionality

milestone_calendar.why_it_matters: Dilution risk for existing shareholders; capital needed to reach data readouts
milestone_calendar.risk_if_delayed: Going concern risk if cash depletes before financing

filing_metadata.note: CP23B-Fix3: Corrected with official XBRL values from MAIA 10-Q

reconciliation_notes: Cash increased from $8.66M (Dec 31, 2025) to $34.41M (Mar 31, 2026) due to: +$31.05M financing (March 2026 offering), -$5.31M operating cash burn
Quarterly operating cash burn: $5.31M actual (official XBRL)
No going-concern uncertainty as of Mar 31, 2026 (management assessed 12+ months runway)
March 2026 public offering: $31.05M net financing proceeds (official XBRL)
Common shares outstanding: 60,671,491 as of Mar 31, 2026 (official XBRL)
Accumulated deficit: -$116.0M as of Mar 31, 2026 (official XBRL)
Working capital: $28.99M as of Mar 31, 2026 (calculated from official XBRL)
financial_snapshot.management_runway_statement: Management believes the Company's existing cash and cash equivalents will be sufficient to fund operations for at least 12 months from the financial statement issuance date.
financial_snapshot.going_concern_language: No going concern uncertainty disclosed in Q1 2026 10-Q

cash_runway_scenarios.assumptions: Low scenario: 85% of official base burn
Base scenario: 100% of official base burn
High scenario: 135% of official base burn

dilution_timing_risk.sufficient_to_reach_milestone: Unknown - depends on THIO-104 data timing which is not disclosed; Management states 12+ months runway sufficient
dilution_timing_risk.phase_3_cost_escalation_risk: High - Phase 3 trials expensive, enrollment acceleration increases burn
dilution_timing_risk.may_need_capital_before_data: Possible if THIO-104 data is >19.4 months out; Management assessed 12+ months runway
dilution_timing_risk.fully_diluted_from_cp23a: CP23A-Fix estimates will need reconciliation against official Q1 2026 basic shares (60,671,491) + options (13,097,991) + warrants (13,086,220) = ~86.86M fully diluted

positive_signals: FDA Fast Track Designation for THIO-104 demonstrates regulatory interest
Phase 3 pivotal trial initiated (indicates confidence in Phase 2 data)
clinical_execution_risks: Phase 3 enrollment may be slow or competitive
COVID-19 or other disruptions may delay trial conduct
Trial execution at multiple sites requires operational excellence
trial_design_risks: OS endpoint requires long follow-up period
Sample size may be underpowered if assumptions off
Interim futility analysis could halt trial early
endpoint_risks: OS takes years to mature; PFS may not correlate
PFS alone may not support approval without OS benefit
Response rates may not meet expectations vs. SOC
safety_tolerability_risks: Adverse events may limit dosing or discontinuation
Safety profile may not be competitive vs. alternatives
Immune-related AEs if combination with checkpoint inhibitors
enrollment_risks: Immunotherapy combinations are standard of care
Patient population limited by prior lines of therapy
competitive_landscape: New entrants and novel mechanisms emerging
regulatory_risk: FDA may require additional data beyond single Phase 3
Accelerated approval path may not be available
Label may be restricted to narrow population
commercialization_risk: Market access uncertain even if approved
Payer coverage may be limited without compelling differentiation
May require commercial partnership for successful launch
clinical_risk_assessment.overall_assessment: High-risk, high-reward Phase 3 biotech with significant clinical, regulatory, and commercial execution risk. Runway requires monitoring.

market_confirmation_monitoring.price_performance: Stock price vs. March 2026 offering price ($1.50): premium indicates confidence, discount indicates dilution concern
market_confirmation_monitoring.volume_response: Volume response to clinical updates: high volume on positive news = institutional interest
market_confirmation_monitoring.rally_sustainability: Sustained rallies = belief in story; quick sell-offs = skepticism
market_confirmation_monitoring.insider_activity: Form 4 open-market purchases signal confidence; Form 144 selling signals potential concern
market_confirmation_monitoring.institutional_positioning: 13D/13G 5%+ stakes indicate conviction; 13F changes show hedge fund accumulation
market_confirmation_monitoring.financing_signals: New S-3/424B/ATM filings signal dilution risk and cash pressure

market_confirmation_watchlist.why_it_matters: Premium indicates confidence, discount indicates dilution concern
market_confirmation_watchlist.monitoring_method: Track daily close vs. $1.50 March 2026 offering price
Monitor volume spikes on PR dates

market_confirmation_watchlist.why_it_matters: Signals dilution risk and cash pressure

limitations: Cash balance and burn rates are estimated based on CP23A-Fix financing and typical Phase 2/3 biotech patterns
Full reconciliation requires manual extraction from Q1 2026 10-Q filed May 11, 2026
THIO-101 clinical details not disclosed in available filings
Milestone timing not disclosed by company for either program
Runway scenarios are estimates and may vary based on actual enrollment pace and operational efficiency
This analysis is for research purposes only and is not investment advice

superseded_reasons: CP23B used placeholder values ($40M cash, $10M burn) without sourcing
CP23B-Fix used estimated values based on 'typical Phase 2/3 biotech patterns'
CP23B-Fix2 used incorrect values that did not match official MAIA 10-Q XBRL
CP23B-Fix3 replaces all incorrect values with official SEC 10-Q XBRL disclosed values

cp23b_fix2_incorrect_values.note: CP23B-Fix2 used incorrect values that did not match official MAIA 10-Q XBRL. These superseded incorrect values are documented here for reference only.
